message:
🌱 Sync live /etc/supervised-agent configs into examples/kubestellar/agents/

Adds feature.env, outreach.env, scanner.env (new).
Updates reviewer.env, supervisor.env to match live /etc versions.
Supervisor now commits these on every pass to keep repo current.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+# /etc/supervised-agent/feature.env
+#
+# Feature / ideator agent — architectural RFCs, GA4-driven feature ideas,
+# help-wanted grooming, cross-cutting refactor plans. Third agent alongside
+# scanner (15m, GitHub triage) and reviewer (30m, post-merge state).
+# Policy lives at memory/project_feature_policy.md.
+# Deployed via: sudo ./install.sh --instance feature
+
+AGENT_USER=dev
+AGENT_SESSION_NAME=feature
+AGENT_WORKDIR=/home/dev/kubestellar-console
+AGENT_LAUNCH_CMD="/usr/bin/claude --dangerously-skip-permissions --model claude-opus-4-7"
+
+# /loop cadence is 30 minutes — this is slow thoughtful work, not reactive triage.
+# The real policy is in project_feature_policy.md; re-read every iteration at Step 0.
+# First-task seed: start with kubestellar/console#8695 (responsive-layout RFC).
+AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT="Register: /loop 30m Follow every rule in project_feature_policy.md from memory (lane boundary, RFC structure, GA4 signal proposals, help-wanted grooming, phase-handoff to scanner). At the START of each iteration print FEATURE_START_ET=\$(TZ=America/New_York date \"+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z\") and NEXT_FEATURE_ET = the next */30 firing expressed in America/New_York. At the END print FEATURE_END_ET and restate NEXT_FEATURE_ET. All timestamps MUST be in Eastern Time (America/New_York), never UTC. AFTER registering the cron, immediately run ONE kickoff iteration right now focused on kubestellar/console#8695 per the 'First task' section of the policy — produce the RFC, publish it as a comment on the GitHub issue, and file scanner-handoff beads for each phase. Do NOT wait for the first 30m firing."
+
+AGENT_LOG_FILE=/home/dev/.claude/projects/-Users-andan02/memory/feature_log.md
+
+AGENT_READY_MARKER="bypass permissions on"
+AGENT_READY_TIMEOUT_SEC=45
+AGENT_POLL_SEC=10
+
+AGENT_AUTO_APPROVE_PHRASE="Yes, and always allow access to"
+AGENT_AUTO_DISMISS_PHRASES="How is Claude doing this session?"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_REGEX="usage limit|out of extra usage|Claude usage|rate limit reached|quota exhausted|monthly limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_TITLE="Feature agent hit usage limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_BODY="Feature session at claude-dev hit a quota. /login another account when convenient. 2h cadence means low urgency."
+
+# Feature agent stalls easily (long thinking phases). More generous than scanner/reviewer.
+AGENT_STALE_MAX_SEC=9000   # 2.5h — one full skipped 2h iteration + slack
+AGENT_MAX_RESPAWNS=3
+
+NTFY_TOPIC=issue-scanner
+
+# Display persistence across respawns
+AGENT_TMUX_STATUS_STYLE="bg=colour53,fg=white"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour53"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_ACTIVE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour165"
+AGENT_CLAUDE_RENAME_TO=Architect
+AGENT_CLI=copilot

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+# /etc/supervised-agent/outreach.env
+#
+# Outreach agent — community, adoption, CNCF campaign, blog/newsletter drafts.
+# Fourth agent alongside scanner (15m), reviewer (30m), feature (2h).
+# Policy at memory/project_outreach_policy.md.
+# Deployed via: sudo ./install.sh --instance outreach
+
+AGENT_USER=dev
+AGENT_SESSION_NAME=outreach
+AGENT_WORKDIR=/home/dev/kubestellar-console
+AGENT_LAUNCH_CMD="/usr/bin/claude --dangerously-skip-permissions --model claude-sonnet-4-6"
+
+# /loop cadence is 2h. Real policy is in project_outreach_policy.md — re-read at Step 0.
+# First task: take stock of the CNCF outreach campaign, pull fresh GA4 numbers,
+# identify one new candidate.
+AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT="Re-read project_outreach_policy.md from memory. You are in EXECUTOR MODE — no /loop, no cron, no self-scheduling. Then stay at the prompt and wait for work orders from the supervisor. If no directive arrives within 2h, run one proactive CNCF outreach candidate scan, log it to outreach_log.md, then return to idle."
+
+AGENT_LOG_FILE=/home/dev/.claude/projects/-Users-andan02/memory/outreach_log.md
+
+AGENT_READY_MARKER="bypass permissions on"
+AGENT_READY_TIMEOUT_SEC=45
+AGENT_POLL_SEC=10
+
+AGENT_AUTO_APPROVE_PHRASE="Yes, and always allow access to"
+AGENT_AUTO_DISMISS_PHRASES="How is Claude doing this session?"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_REGEX="usage limit|out of extra usage|Claude usage|rate limit reached|quota exhausted|monthly limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_TITLE="Outreach agent hit usage limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_BODY="Outreach session at claude-dev hit a quota. /login another account when convenient. 2h cadence = low urgency."
+
+# Outreach has long GA4 queries + drafts; generous stale threshold.
+AGENT_STALE_MAX_SEC=9000
+AGENT_MAX_RESPAWNS=3
+
+NTFY_TOPIC=issue-scanner
+
+# Display persistence across respawns
+AGENT_TMUX_STATUS_STYLE="bg=colour94,fg=white"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour94"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_ACTIVE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour208"
+AGENT_CLAUDE_RENAME_TO=Outreach
+AGENT_CLI=copilot

@@ -1,30 +1,41 @@
-# KubeStellar Reviewer — executor (Sonnet)
+# /etc/supervised-agent/reviewer.env
+#
+# Reviewer agent — regression guardian + UX improver for kubestellar/console.
+# Deployed via: sudo ./install.sh --instance reviewer  (from supervised-agent repo)
+# Policy lives in memory/project_reviewer_policy.md on the shared Syncthing dir.
 
-AGENT_USER=andan02
-AGENT_WORKDIR=/root/.kubestellar-agents/reviewer/console
-AGENT_BACKEND=claude
-AGENT_FALLBACK_BACKEND=copilot
-AGENT_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4-5
-AGENT_LAUNCH_CMD="agent-launch.sh --backend ${AGENT_BACKEND} --model ${AGENT_MODEL}"
-AGENT_SESSION_NAME=ks-reviewer
-AGENT_LOG_FILE=/root/.kubestellar-agents/reviewer/heartbeat.log
+AGENT_USER=dev
+AGENT_SESSION_NAME=reviewer
+AGENT_WORKDIR=/home/dev/kubestellar-console
+AGENT_LAUNCH_CMD="/usr/bin/claude --dangerously-skip-permissions --model claude-sonnet-4-6"
 
-AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT="You are the KubeStellar Reviewer in EXECUTOR MODE. Read your CLAUDE.md. Wait for work orders from the supervisor."
+# Short loop prompt — the real policy is in project_reviewer_policy.md, re-read
+# every iteration at Step 0.
+AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT="Re-read project_reviewer_policy.md from memory. You are in EXECUTOR MODE — no self-scheduling, no /loop cron. Then stay at the prompt and wait for work orders from the supervisor. If no directive arrives within 45 min, run one proactive nightly regression + CodeQL drain pass, log it to reviewer_log.md, then return to idle."
 
-AGENT_READY_MARKER=bypass permissions on
+AGENT_LOG_FILE=/home/dev/.claude/projects/-Users-andan02/memory/reviewer_log.md
+
+AGENT_READY_MARKER="bypass permissions on"
 AGENT_READY_TIMEOUT_SEC=45
 AGENT_POLL_SEC=10
-AGENT_AUTO_APPROVE_PHRASE=Yes, and always allow access to
-AGENT_AUTO_DISMISS_PHRASES='How is Claude doing this session?'
-AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_REGEX=usage limit|out of extra usage|rate limit reached|quota exhausted
-AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_TITLE=👁️ Reviewer needs attention
-AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_BODY=Reviewer blocked on quota.
-
-AGENT_TMUX_STATUS_STYLE=fg=colour255,bg=colour94
-AGENT_TMUX_PANE_BORDER_STYLE=fg=colour94
-AGENT_TMUX_PANE_ACTIVE_BORDER_STYLE=fg=colour94
-AGENT_CLAUDE_RENAME_TO=👁️ Reviewer
-
-AGENT_STALE_MAX_SEC=1800
+
+# Same auto-approve / auto-dismiss / notify-on-phrase patterns as the scanner.
+AGENT_AUTO_APPROVE_PHRASE="Yes, and always allow access to"
+AGENT_AUTO_DISMISS_PHRASES="How is Claude doing this session?"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_REGEX="usage limit|out of extra usage|Claude usage|rate limit reached|quota exhausted|monthly limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_TITLE="Reviewer hit usage limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_BODY="Reviewer session at claude-dev hit a quota. /login another account when convenient. Stale-claim sweep on next iteration will recover in-flight work."
+
+# Reviewer stalls faster than scanner (less work per iteration) — tighter
+# staleness threshold so the healthcheck respawns sooner if the loop gets stuck.
+AGENT_STALE_MAX_SEC=2400
 AGENT_MAX_RESPAWNS=3
-NTFY_TOPIC=
+
+NTFY_TOPIC=issue-scanner
+
+# Display persistence across respawns
+AGENT_TMUX_STATUS_STYLE="bg=colour22,fg=white"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour22"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_ACTIVE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour82"
+AGENT_CLAUDE_RENAME_TO=Reviewer
+AGENT_CLI=copilot

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# /etc/supervised-agent/scanner.env
+# Scanner-specific overrides. The scanner uses its own scanner-supervisor.sh
+# (not agent-supervisor.sh), but reads AGENT_CLI from here for CLI selection.
+# This file is sourced by the claude-dev local script when --copilot/--claude
+# is passed to the scanner.
+AGENT_CLI=copilot

@@ -1,32 +1,32 @@
-# KubeStellar Supervisor — the brain (Opus)
-# Runs /loop, does ALL triage/planning, dispatches to Sonnet executors.
+# /etc/supervised-agent/supervisor.env
+#
+# Supervisor agent — dispatches work to scanner, reviewer, feature, outreach.
+# This is the "brain" that coordinates all other agents.
 
-AGENT_USER=andan02
-AGENT_WORKDIR=/root/.kubestellar-agents/supervisor
-AGENT_BACKEND=claude
-AGENT_FALLBACK_BACKEND=copilot
-AGENT_MODEL=claude-opus-4-6
-AGENT_LAUNCH_CMD="agent-launch.sh --backend ${AGENT_BACKEND} --model ${AGENT_MODEL}"
-AGENT_SESSION_NAME=ks-supervisor
-AGENT_LOG_FILE=/root/.kubestellar-agents/supervisor/heartbeat.log
+AGENT_USER=dev
+AGENT_SESSION_NAME=supervisor
+AGENT_WORKDIR=/home/dev/kubestellar-console
+AGENT_LAUNCH_CMD="/usr/bin/claude --dangerously-skip-permissions --model claude-opus-4-7"
 
-# Self-scheduling — supervisor IS the loop
-AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT="/loop 1m Read state.db + beads. Triage all new items. Write precise work orders. Dispatch to executors. Send ntfy digest. Follow CLAUDE.md."
+AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT="You are the Supervisor. Read the kubestellar/supervised-agent repo entirely (gh repo view kubestellar/supervised-agent and all files under bin/, config/, docs/, examples/) to get full context of the runtime you are part of. Then read project_scanner_policy.md from memory. Check tmux sessions (scanner, reviewer, feature, outreach) for status. Triage open issues across all 6 repos, dispatch work orders to the appropriate agent via tmux send-keys. Monitor open PRs, merge when CI green. Report status summary. At the end of every pass run: bd dolt push. Also commit and push any changes made to /tmp/supervised-agent/ to keep the kubestellar/supervised-agent repo current (cd /tmp/supervised-agent && git add -A && git commit -s -m "message" && git push origin main)."
 
-AGENT_READY_MARKER=bypass permissions on
+AGENT_READY_MARKER="bypass permissions on"
 AGENT_READY_TIMEOUT_SEC=45
 AGENT_POLL_SEC=10
-AGENT_AUTO_APPROVE_PHRASE=Yes, and always allow access to
-AGENT_AUTO_DISMISS_PHRASES='How is Claude doing this session?'
-AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_REGEX=usage limit|out of extra usage|rate limit reached|quota exhausted|monthly limit
-AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_TITLE=🎯 Supervisor needs attention
-AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_BODY=Supervisor Opus session blocked on quota. No new dispatches until resolved.
 
-AGENT_TMUX_STATUS_STYLE=fg=colour255,bg=colour24
-AGENT_TMUX_PANE_BORDER_STYLE=fg=colour24
-AGENT_TMUX_PANE_ACTIVE_BORDER_STYLE=fg=colour24
-AGENT_CLAUDE_RENAME_TO=🎯 Supervisor
+AGENT_AUTO_APPROVE_PHRASE="Yes, and always allow access to"
+AGENT_AUTO_DISMISS_PHRASES="How is Claude doing this session?"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_REGEX="usage limit|out of extra usage|Claude usage|rate limit reached|quota exhausted|monthly limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_TITLE="Supervisor hit usage limit"
+AGENT_NOTIFY_ON_PHRASE_BODY="Supervisor session at claude-dev hit a quota. /login another account when convenient."
 
-AGENT_STALE_MAX_SEC=300
-AGENT_MAX_RESPAWNS=5
-NTFY_TOPIC=
+AGENT_STALE_MAX_SEC=3600
+AGENT_MAX_RESPAWNS=3
+
+NTFY_TOPIC=issue-scanner
+
+AGENT_TMUX_STATUS_STYLE="bg=colour196,fg=white"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour196"
+AGENT_TMUX_PANE_ACTIVE_BORDER_STYLE="fg=colour226"
+AGENT_CLAUDE_RENAME_TO=Supervisor
+AGENT_CLI=copilot
